The escaped creature can be found somewhere in the Sail-haven. Tâbrim informed you that the creature tore up some stonework as it fled into the Sail-h…
The cave-claw can be found in a small alley in the Sail-haven. You have found a fearful cave-claw, and it is clearly overwhelmed by its new home. You …
Sacks of potatoes can be found in a small alley in the Sail-haven. You have found the cave-claw, but it appears very uneasy. You should find something…
The cave-claw can be found in a small alley in the Sail-haven. You have collected a fine potato, and you should offer it to the frightened cave-claw.
Henok can be found in a small alley in the Sail-haven. One of the Temámir, Henok, has arrived to collect his companion. You should talk to Henok.
